backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (BlogPost, UserProfile, ImageMeta, etc.) and canister methods for blog post CRUD, user profile management, comments, and blob storage, with role-based access control enforced via AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: removing Internet Identity login/logout UI from Navigation, and making admin/create/edit blog post pages fully accessible without authentication guards.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose, used as build planning reference documentation.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS entry file defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, destructive, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React app, setting charset, viewport, description meta, theme color, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (public, blog, admin, category, and sub-category pages), wraps the app in QueryClientProvider, ThemeProvider, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Displays a centered access-denied message with a ShieldX icon and a 'Go to Home' button for users lacking admin privileges.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Passthrough wrapper component for admin routes that renders children directly without any authentication guard, relying on backend permission enforcement.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Sidebar component for the blog section providing a search input, a list of up to five popular published posts, and a static category links list.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Renders a comment section for a blog post, supporting both pre-loaded and fetched comments, with a form to submit new comments using author name and text fields.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Displays a featured blog post as a large card with an overlay image, title, excerpt, metadata, and a link to the full article.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site-wide footer with brand logo, social media links, and navigation columns for quick links, categories, and legal pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Wraps page content with the shared Navigation and Footer components in a full-height flex layout.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop dropdown for categories and a collapsible mobile menu, linking to main site sections.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post summary card with thumbnail image, category badge, title, excerpt, metadata, and a 'Read More' link.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: A controlled search input component with clear button and keyboard event handlers (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown) forwarded via ref.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown list of search results with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) that navigates to the selected result's path on selection.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including fetching/creating/updating blog posts, comments, and images, using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Hook that provides client-side search over a static list of Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering by title, category, and keywords based on a user-supplied query string.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind CSS layers, defines CSS custom properties for light/dark themes using OKLCH colors, and adds utility component classes for the AyurGlow brand.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and core values using a hero section, two-column layout, and icon-based value cards.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that lists all blog posts with options to create, edit, delete, and toggle publish state, using mutation hooks and toast notifications for feedback.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page that fetches and displays published posts as cards with featured images, metadata, and excerpts, alongside a sidebar.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single blog post that renders content with inline image marker replacement, displays metadata and tags, and includes a comment section.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating a new blog post, supporting title, slug, category, content, tags, featured image upload, and inline image insertion with upload progress tracking.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing an existing blog post, pre-populating all fields and images from the fetched post data and submitting updates via the updatePost mutation.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: Detail page listing four Ayurvedic dandruff and scalp care remedies, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and usage frequency, rendered as styled cards.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: Detail page presenting four Ayurvedic remedies for preventing and reversing premature grey hair, including oil infusions and hair packs with full ingredient and application details.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: Detail page showcasing four Ayurvedic hair fall treatment remedies such as onion juice and fenugreek masks, each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: Detail page featuring four Ayurvedic hair growth remedies including oil blends and herbal masks, with structured ingredient lists, application instructions, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: Displays a hair care page featuring five Ayurvedic oil treatments and hair masks (e.g., Brahmi-Amla oil, Hibiscus-Fenugreek mask), each with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency. Includes a hero section with a back link to the Hair Care index.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Static category landing page for Hair Care that displays a hero section and a grid of subcategory links covering topics like hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, and oils.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: Renders a simple health remedies page with four natural remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management (fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, garlic-lemon). Uses a minimal card layout without custom UI components.
A styled alternative to DiabetesBPPage that presents the same diabetes and BP remedies using Card components, a hero section, a medical disclaimer Alert, and a back link to the Health Remedies index.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: Displays four Ayurvedic digestion remedies (Triphala, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, buttermilk with cumin) in a styled Card layout with a hero section and back navigation to Health Remedies.
A simpler digestion remedies page listing four Ayurvedic treatments (Triphala, CCF tea, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water) using plain div cards without custom UI components or hero section.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: Alternative immunity-boosting remedies page with a hero section, back-navigation link, and Card-based layout presenting four similar Ayurvedic remedies with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.

Displays four Ayurvedic immunity-boosting remedies (Turmeric Golden Milk, Tulsi-Ginger Tea, Chyawanprash Tonic, Amla-Honey Shot) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency using a simple card layout.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: Renders four Ayurvedic stress-relief and sleep remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, Almond-Saffron Milk) with icons, ingredients, application steps, and frequency in a card grid layout.

Alternative stress and sleep solutions page featuring a purple-themed hero section with back navigation and Card-based display of four calming Ayurvedic remedies including preparation steps, benefits, and usage.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: Presents four Ayurvedic weight management remedies (Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul, Ginger-Green Tea, Cabbage-Carrot Juice) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and recommended frequency in a card layout.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Displays the Health Remedies category page with a hero section and a grid of five Ayurvedic subcategory cards (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes & BP, Stress & Sleep) that link to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the site's home page featuring a hero banner, category cards, benefits section, stats, and a preview of the latest three published blog posts fetched via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Da: Displays a page detailing three Ayurvedic daily routine practices (Dinacharya, Abhyanga, Evening Wind-Down) with step-by-step instructions, benefits, frequency, and duration for each.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Mo: Renders a page covering four Ayurvedic morning rituals (oil pulling, tongue scraping, warm lemon water, self-oil massage) with steps, benefits, and frequency information.
frontend/src/pages/lifestyle-wellness/Yo: Presents a page on four yoga and meditation practices (Pranayama, Sun Salutation, Mindfulness Meditation, Yoga Nidra) with detailed step-by-step guides, benefits, and session durations.
frontend/src/pages/LifestyleWellnessPage: Displays the Lifestyle & Wellness category page with a hero section, three subcategory cards (Morning Rituals, Yoga & Meditation, Daily Routines), and an informational blurb about Ayurvedic Dinacharya.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Renders the Privacy Policy page with styled cards covering introduction, automatically collected information, and user-provided data sections, along with a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: Displays an Ayurvedic skin care page for acne and pimples featuring four natural remedy recipes (Neem-Turmeric, Tea Tree, Sandalwood, Aloe Vera) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Renders a simpler acne treatment page listing four Ayurvedic remedies (Neem-Turmeric paste, Tea Tree-Aloe spot treatment, Sandalwood face pack, Cinnamon-Honey mask) with ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Displays a page of four Ayurvedic anti-aging remedies (e.g., Almond-Saffron Serum, Avocado-Honey Mask) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Renders a page listing five DIY face pack recipes (e.g., Multani Mitti, Besan-Turmeric) with skin type targeting, ingredients, application steps, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Shows four Ayurvedic natural glow remedies (e.g., Turmeric-Yogurt Mask, Saffron-Milk Treatment) with ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and recommended frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Presents a styled page with a hero section and four natural remedies for pigmentation and dark spots, using Card components and a back-link to the skin care section.
Displays four Ayurvedic pigmentation-reduction remedies with ingredients, application steps, and a sun-protection warning banner advising sunscreen use during treatment.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Displays the Skin Care category page with a hero section and a grid of five subcategory cards (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) linking to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Renders the Terms of Service page with a medical disclaimer alert and styled cards covering agreement terms and website usage policy, along with a back-to-home link.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Fat: Displays a page of Ayurvedic fat-burning drink remedies (e.g., lemon-honey water, green tea with ginger) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Met: Displays a page of Ayurvedic metabolism-boosting remedies (e.g., Triphala-Guggul blend, turmeric tonic) with ingredients, steps, benefits, and usage details.
frontend/src/pages/weight-management/Wei: Displays a page of Ayurvedic weight-loss recipes (e.g., moong dal soup, oats-chia breakfast) with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and recommended frequency.
Landing page for the Weight Management category displaying a hero section and three subcategory cards (Fat Burning Drinks, Metabolism Boosters, Healthy Weight Loss Recipes) with links to their respective routes.
frontend/src/utils/imageUtils.ts: Provides utility functions for converting ExternalBlob objects to display URLs and replacing inline image markers (e.g., `{{inline-image:N}}`) in HTML content with actual `` tags.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with optional sessionStorage persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining a custom design system with OKLCH-based color tokens, custom fonts, border radii, box shadows, and animations for the AyurGlow application.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state for 'AyurGlow Secrets', a blog platform being refactored to remove all authentication requirements, making admin pages and operations publicly accessible. Contains existing features, pending action requests, and architectural notes about removing Internet Identity login.
